name: 隱忍媳婦×腹黑白蓮花嫂子
name_en: Enduring Wife × Scheming White Lotus Sister-in-Law
description: Michelle和Ruth的對立是全劇核心衝突引擎。Ruth用偽善手段佔據道德高地，Michelle被冤枉卻無人相信。這種「真善vs偽善」的對決讓觀眾產生強烈的代入感和正義渴望。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Ruth, she tried to hurt you. ... Got the act, Ruth. You know exactly what happened yesterday, just like I do. You know, if you put half as much passion in your acting career as you do your fake little sob stories, you'd be a Hollywood star by now.
examples.context: Michelle和Ruth的對立是全劇核心衝突引擎。Ruth用偽善手段佔據道德高地，Michelle被冤枉卻無人相信。這種「真善vs偽善」的對決讓觀眾產生強烈的代入感和正義渴望。
